{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "tested/inspected",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 95,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Motor disconnect is not within sight of the motor controller and motor, violating NEC sight-distance requirement",
    "Disconnect placement passed through inspection without correction, indicating inspection gate failure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a disconnect within sight of the motor and controller, or verify an alternative compliant disconnect arrangement per NEC 430.102",
    "Lock out and tag out the motor circuit until the disconnect is relocated or a compliant alternative is verified",
    "Re-inspect the circuit after corrective work and update the inspection checklist"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 430.102 requires the disconnecting means for a motor to be located within sight of the motor controller and motor, or comply with the exception for locked disconnects. A disconnect not within sight is a non-compliant installation that passed inspection, creating a safety hazard for maintenance personnel who cannot visually verify the disconnect is open while working on the motor.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 430.102",
    "NEC Art. 430"
  ]
}
